ab: h’otosvo maitan’e, momza yuyuso ’o ohaeva no’u mamespingi uhne maibayu ho aiti ‘o amoconi.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去嘉義拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Chiayi to visit my uncle.

ab: mimza ’i’mi ne taipahu ho yonto kuyai no tacvoh’i ho uhne maibayu.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去嘉義。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Chiayi.

ab: mimza cu sʉcʉhʉ ne maibayu, poʉtʉcʉ to kuyai ’o amoconi uhto ’letosvakuyai ho suputi amia.
ch: 到了嘉義，叔叔開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: o’amo nomcovhi to ’oyona letosvakuyai ’o emoo to amoconi, homo poʉt’ʉcʉ to kuyai moc’o osni sʉcʉhʉ.
ch: 車站離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle’s house, and it’s just a short drive away.

ab: cum’u to emoo to amoconi pantomo meoino leaʉtʉcʉ moatʉ’nʉ, mimza smopayo to zitensa ho uhto leaʉtʉcʉ moatʉ’nʉ.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle’s house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: yonto meoino leaʉtʉcʉ moatʉ’nʉ, hafa to amoconi a’mia ho p’onʉ ’to moat’ʉnʉ ho smopayo to uma.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎馬。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: micu yofna, mimza evasʉzʉ ho uhto ’iciva ho eabobonʉ.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: mo man’i ’o kuyai to ’iciva, ko’ko mimzac’o yonto ’otovai ho uhto ic’o.
ch: 市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: ne temzacu mongoi, ’iamaihe peo’eoza ’o otovai’, ko’ko mimzacuc’o yonto vasu ho mongoi.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: mimzacu yuovei ne taipahu, o’a imza cohivi ’o ’otovai to amoconi isicu nana ahta elʉa.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don’t know if my uncle’s motorcycle has been found.
